LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-24-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JULY 19, 2022. DEFENDANT FILED A REPLY BRIEF INDICATING THAT IT WAS SERVED WITH AN OPPOSITION. THERE IS NO OPPOSITION ON FILE WITH THE COURT IN THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF SHALL IMMEDIATELY FILE THE OPPOSITION WITH THE COURT AND PROVIDE A HARD COURTESY OF THE OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. IT APPEARS THAT PLAINTIFF FILED THE OPPOSITION IN A DIFFERENT CASE-CGC-21-595816. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/SRB)

MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant the City and County of San Francisco's motion for leave to file first amended answer.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court acknowledges that a Request for Dismissal of Entire Action has been filed. The matter is off calendar.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Continued To Oct-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City & County of San Francisco's demurrer to cause of action one for "general negligence" is sustained with 20 days leave to amend.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2022 Continued To Jul-19-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is continued to July 19, 2022. Defendant filed a reply brief indicating that it was served with an opposition. There is no opposition on file with the court in this case. Plaintiff shall immediately file the opposition with the court and provide a hard courtesy of the opposition to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. It appears that plaintiff filed the opposition in a different case-CGC-21-595816.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/SRB)
